T0105.title: Data Enrichment
T0105.definition: The process of cleaning and enriching raw data obtained from upstream sources to increase its value for downstream fraud or illicit marketing. This involves filtering out invalid or inactive phone numbers, appending geographic location data, and inferring demographic attributes such as age. The refined data enables more precise targeting of victims for scams or spam campaigns.
